summary: Round-2 verification after iteration_1 fixes. Backend: 37/37 pytest tests pass (added 2 new tests for /api/health/services + 1 for /api/metrics auth requirement; fixed pricing test idempotency with force=True). Frontend: All 10 tabs load without errors. Health and Metrics tabs — both previously broken — now render correctly. Google Sign-in button is properly hidden when /api/config returns empty google_client_id. No regressions on the 32 previously-passing endpoints or other tabs.
verified_fixes: GET /api/metrics/timeseries?time_range=30d -> 200 with rows containing {bucket,k,v} (no more 422 _kw error)
GET /api/health/services with token -> 200 with array of 4 service rows containing service_name,last_seen,minutes_since,traces_48h,error_rate,cost_48h
Health.tsx now calls /health/services and renders 4 service rows with status badges (quiet/stale)
Login.tsx hides Google button since /api/config returns empty google_client_id
regression_verified_endpoints: Protected endpoints all return 401 without/with-invalid token
frontend_tabs_verified: Overview (KPI tiles + trends ECharts + cost-by-service bar)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 850+ lines — consider splitting into routers (filters, metrics, traces, cost, sessions, insights, pricing) for maintainability.
DB connection per-query via _conn() opens/closes a SQLite handle on every call — fine for current scale but consider a single shared connection or connection pool for higher throughput.
Pricing POST/PATCH: PATCH does not validate that pid exists (silently returns ok even if no row updated). Minor; consider verifying rowcount.
seed_data_creation: Pricing row TEST_model_x is added by test_pricing_crud (now idempotent via force=True). No other test data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All known issues from iteration_1 are resolved. Frontend now fully functional across all tabs. Backend has comprehensive pytest coverage in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/` to regression-test backend in one go. Default time range is 1d in UI.
